---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem statement

What user or operator problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the proposed behavior.

## Scope area

- [ ] Ingestion, entity mapping, scoring, or signals (`aetherius/app/services/...`)
- [ ] Delivery / templates / review workflow
- [ ] Backtests (`simulations/backtest/...`)
- [ ] Docs / landing page / release process

## Acceptance criteria

How should we know this is done?

## Risks and trade-offs

Any reliability, security, or complexity concerns?

## Additional context

Links, references, examples, or mock outputs.
